James F. Hannawalt, of Office of the City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3800, for defendants;

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and Bennie Traylor's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition filed. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2016 Continued To Mar-15-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Plaintiff Naji Srour telephone number 415-200-6515 in Propria Persona.
Karen Kirby of Office of the City Attorney telephone number 415-554-3891 for Defendants City and County of San Francisco and Bennie Traylor.

Mr. Srour stated that he is having difficulty finding an Attorney. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. Defendants City and County of San Francisco and Bennie Traylor's motion for summary judgment is continued to March 15, 2017 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302. Mr. Srour is to file his opposition by February 28, 2017.
